data.title: 国际服活动「Highlander Railroad Runaway Incident: And the Train Disappeared」
data.summary: [Event Preview] A turbulent, high-stake chase over a missing freight train takes place. Will Sensei
data.body:
[Event Preview]

A turbulent, high-stake chase over a missing freight train takes place. Will Sensei and the Highlander students be able to complete their mission?

#BlueArchive
